**Checklist**

- [ ] Both gates pass locally — see [The two gates](https://github.com/svyatov/devto-client/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#the-two-gates)
- [ ] New or changed behavior has a test covering it
- [ ] If this adds an endpoint, the spec came first and `bun run generate` was rerun — see [Adding an endpoint](https://github.com/svyatov/devto-client/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#adding-an-endpoint)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (release-please reads them to cut the changelog)
